tech_news.title: Microsoft teases its next Xbox, says ‘Project Helix’ will play PC games too - The Verge
tech_news.description: The next-generation Xbox console will play both Xbox and PC games, and its codename is “Project Helix,” according to Microsoft gaming CEO Asha Sharma.

tech_news.description: Apple's week of launches has seen it update its iPhones, MacBooks, iPads, and displays, but only some updates are stand-outs while the rest are trivial.

tech_news.title: Pokémon Pokopia is out today, but it already has its first limited-time event, with three cute Pokémon only available for a two-week window this month - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: The first Pokémon Pokopia event sees players meeting and befriending Hoppip, Skiploom and Jumpluff, but they'll only be around for a limited time.
